title: Extension.js Agent Bridge — Control WS Envelope
description: Every frame on the dedicated LOCAL control WebSocket (NOT rspack's broadcast-only /ws), at ws://127.0.0.1:<controlPort><controlPath>. Localhost only — observe + act is a free, local extension.js capability; there is no hosted relay. The MCP is just one client of it, exactly as it reads ready.json today. Roles: producer (in-bundle dev agent via the sidecar) pushes logs; consumer subscribes; controller issues commands. THE CONTRACT — change only by bumping `v`.

role.description: producer = emits LogEvents (the in-bundle dev agent via the sidecar). consumer = subscribes to logs (instanceId only). controller = issues commands (gated; see auth).

context.description: Addressing model shared by `command` and source inspection. One vocabulary for read AND act.

url.description: For context=content|page: glob/substring matching the document(s), e.g. https://shop.example/*.

hello.description: First frame every client sends. Rejected if instanceId mismatches. controller+eval additionally requires `token` (see ready-contract / SURFACE.md auth).

instanceId.description: Shared per-session secret from ready-contract.json (baked into the sidecar as __INSTANCE_ID__).

token.description: Required for controller role issuing `eval`. Contents of the local 0600 session token file written outside dist/.

ready.description: Broker → client after a valid hello. For consumers it precedes a replay of the ring buffer then the live tail.

bufferedFrom.description: Lowest `seq` available in the broker ring for replay.

engine.description: Browser engine, so the controller knows which capability set applies.

capabilities.description: What this engine can actually do. Firefox MV2 lacks sidePanel and closed-shadow piercing. Negotiated, never assumed.

log.description: producer → broker → consumers. `event` validates against log-event-1.0.json.

gap.description: broker → consumer. Honesty signal: events were lost. Emitted whenever the drop count since the last frame is non-zero. NEVER suppressed.

command.description: controller → broker → executor. Correlated by cmdId. Executed locally in the user extension's own context (background SW, surface, or isolated content world).

cmdId.description: Correlation id; the matching `result` echoes it.

op.description: eval is gated (token + --allow-eval). storage/reload/open/tabs/inspect require --allow-control. inspect backs source inspection (Slice 3).

result.description: executor → broker → controller. Value is structured-cloned, JSON-safe and byte-capped. Unserializable values become {__type,preview}.

value.description: Present when ok=true. May be any JSON-safe value, or {__type:'unserializable',preview:string}.

engine.description: name=Unsupported carries the engine that lacks the API (e.g. firefox: no sidePanel).
